display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A celebrated Toronto industrialist and philanthropist dies after being struck on the back of the head. Drama, starring Yannick Bisson and Helene Joy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A hospital is terrorised by a hooded and robed figure with a crossbow, who is exacting revenge on medics he apparently believes responsible of malpractice.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick suspects a prison inmate is to blame for the murder of a guard outside a shop, and Rigsby tries to find out what his father knows about the killing.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After an elite hockey prospect is found dead, Charlie and Jesse disagree over the prime suspect in the case.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown must discover who's out to kill a tortured artist before it's too late.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Al and Carrie's investigation into the murder of an Afghan taxi driver becomes a security issue when it's discovered the victim was a government informant.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: With A Little Help from My Friends: When the severed finger of a handyman mysteriously turns up, Fitz and Arch's investigation turns into a case of vigilante justice.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team are stumped when a famous author is stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim. Dwayne needs a date for a voodoo love festival.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sullivan asks for Father Brown's help when Mrs Devine's son Eddie is framed for murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown must discover who's out to kill a tortured artist before it's too late.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team are stumped when a famous author is stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim. Dwayne needs a date for a voodoo love festival.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After an elite hockey prospect is found dead, Charlie and Jesse disagree over the prime suspect in the case.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the secrets of Toronto's wealthy elite when a member of the rowing club is found dead. Drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective investigates the death of a man apparently forced to drink varnish, while author Arthur Conan Doyle wants to base a new character on Murdoch.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective uncovers a plot to kill a British prince who will be visiting Toronto, and finds himself facing a group of terrorists called the Brotherhood.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the detective pioneering modern day forensics in 19th century Toronto. When Buffalo Bill Cody pulls into town, murder follows behind.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Fall of the House of St Gardner: A gossip columnist is murdered after threatening to expose the secrets of a fashion house.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Members of an orchestra are under suspicion of murder when a violinist is shot dead. Meanwhile, Cho meets a young pickpocket out to prove his jailed father's innocence.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Major Crimes team is forced to turn against Jesse when he becomes the prime suspect in a bank robbery.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama. The body of a man is found in a sportscar he was supposed to deliver to a diplomat. Was he the target or a victim of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective uncovers a plot to kill a British prince who will be visiting Toronto, and finds himself facing a group of terrorists called the Brotherhood.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the detective pioneering modern day forensics in 19th century Toronto. When Buffalo Bill Cody pulls into town, murder follows behind.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Members of an orchestra are under suspicion of murder when a violinist is shot dead. Meanwhile, Cho meets a young pickpocket out to prove his jailed father's innocence.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Major Crimes team is forced to turn against Jesse when he becomes the prime suspect in a bank robbery.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Fall of the House of St Gardner: A gossip columnist is murdered after threatening to expose the secrets of a fashion house.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama. The body of a man is found in a sportscar he was supposed to deliver to a diplomat. Was he the target or a victim of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A blind woman dies live on stage while being treated by a faith healer - and when it turns out she has been poisoned, all eyes turn to the man's cup of holy water.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A lottery winner is found dead at her villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. But the mystery deepens when the victim's body vanishes..

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: As Sabrina waits for the axe to fall on her career, she must do everything in her power to keep a troubled teen caught in a bloody gang conflict from becoming a killer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Tucked away in the showroom is a WW2-era Willys Jeep. Its original condition means there might be a bunfight for a military vehicle that's ripe for restoration.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: After Dunkirk, Britain faced an onslaught. Although the RAF won the Battle of Britain, our cities were blitzed. Laurence Olivier tells us more in the landmark series on WWII.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Guided missiles, the Wasserfall, and the war-changing V2 were dreamed up and tested in Peenemunde, a German seaside city suddenly overtaken by Nazi elite.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Brighton College, where objects up for valuation include a medal from the Battle of Trafalgar.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on one of Derek's favourites - an Austin A35 - but its age ensures some hefty bills. To bank some cash, their second project is a quick flip - a 1999 BMW Z3. S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasn't seen the light of day in thirty years.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rusty 1970 Fiat 500 goes under the hammer - Derek reckons it's the kind of vehicle that is so iconic that it has to be saved.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Tucked away in the showroom is a WW2-era Willys Jeep. Its original condition means there might be a bunfight for a military vehicle that's ripe for restoration.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Ford Thames 400E that once belonged to the pop band Edison Lighthouse. Plus, Dave heads to York to collect an Astra GTE convertible.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Middlesex and Surrey, where projects include repurposing a 1950s hairdryer, updating a school desk and the restoration of a child's motorbike.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The speedster tries to break the world speed record for a hovercraft, but hovercrafts are notoriously unstable at speed and Guy is out of his comfort zone on water.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The inside story of the motoring fan's attempt to break the motorcycle land speed record - can he become the first man to do 400 miles per hour on a motorcycle.

programme.title: Our Guy in Colombia
programme.desc: After getting kidnapped, tortured and shot, Guy Martin heads off to see how easy it is to buy drugs in Medellin, a place once known as the most dangerous city in the world.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's a surprise waiting for Derek in Hull - a MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. In North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his son's Ford Escort RS 1600i.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A series of head-turning supercharged cars head to the Mathewson's auction room. Plus, going under Derek's hammer - a Ford Escort XR3 and a beautiful MGA.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Germany's preparations for WW2 began years before 1939. Under various guises, Germany began work on what would become their most technologically advanced front.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a second visit to Hopetoun House in South Queensferry, Edinburgh, valuing items including Victorian dresses.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to the British Museum in London to value more of the public's keepsakes including a pair of wooden pillars from HMS Victory.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for auction this week is a 1980 Ford Escort, a hand-built 1946 Bedford 12 electric car, and a beautiful, red 1957 Austin Healey.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a beautifully restored and carefully modified 1936 Wolseley 14/56. Meanwhile, a Batman-inspired Chrysler Crossfire is dropped off at the Thornton le Dale garage.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Germany's preparations for WW2 began years before 1939. Under various guises, Germany began work on what would become their most technologically advanced front.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a second visit to Hopetoun House in South Queensferry, Edinburgh, valuing items including Victorian dresses.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming takes a tumble at Buckby Locks in Northamptonshire and has a problem with his power supply and battery bank.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When Shirley's dad loses his job, Wolfie is determined to win it back - along with the old man's favour. However, nothing ever goes to plan in a Wolfie Smith campaign. S2 E.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and the Tooting Popular Front find themselves terrified by local criminal Fenning over an issue of stolen stereos.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is shell-shocked to be given a job despite his best efforts otherwise, but Dad is delighted that Yeti is joining the honest working classes.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for auction this week is a 1980 Ford Escort, a hand-built 1946 Bedford 12 electric car, and a beautiful, red 1957 Austin Healey.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a beautifully restored and carefully modified 1936 Wolseley 14/56. Meanwhile, a Batman-inspired Chrysler Crossfire is dropped off at the Thornton le Dale garage.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Series Premiere: After leading London 2012 and serving as BBC Head of Values, Ian Fletcher joins the 2026 World Cup team as Director of Integrity. S1 E1

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Opening Match
programme.desc: Live coverage of the Opening Ceremony and the opening match as hosts Mexico take on South Africa from the Estadio Azteca in Mexico City, Mexico.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Hosted by Adil Ray, Celebrity Lingo sees famous faces pair up and go head-to-head in the fast-paced wordplay game and win big money for their charities.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: The death of Levi's high school nemesis brings many blasts from the past. But who is hiding secrets from back then? S5 E8

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Vanessa are installing handmade ceiling frescoes to their ballroom ceiling. It’s decision time for Lucy and Tim—which château will become their forever home?

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: In Cornwall, Sarah and Adam Smith are building a modular home for their family after returning from Derbyshire. Delays and a tricky sloped site forced them into a caravan for two years.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Dermot's pre-marriage nerves get the better of him and he locks himself away in a cupboard, so it is up to Mrs Brown to try to calm him down. Meanwhile, Rory tells his mother he's gay. S1 E5

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob and Monica travel to the Malaysian rainforest to work at the Datai Langkawi hotel, where monkeys roam free and the soundtrack of forest wildlife is ever present.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: Jan’s pregnancy sparks a crisis between George and Fiona. Katie unwillingly gets Shay involved in an art scam. S2 E13

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: It's an epic offshore adventure on the Kapiti coast as the challenge is set to land a trophy fish and hunt a trophy deer. The boys get dealt a classic Wellington weather bomb.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Massey University investigates pasture species in regen ag; Fruit producers and workers alike harvest benefits of the RSE scheme; and Massey’s Horticulture Society grows opportunities for students.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Wool Warrior: On a rugged northern Wairarapa farm, a woman continues her family tradition of growing top-quality wool and selling products made from it internationally.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: And a tough day at the office for Blind Low Vision dog Archie, Mobility pup Fletcher snuggles his way through his job, and which Corrections pup will come out on top, Bindi or Bart? S4 E8

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa can't get enough of puff as they present four fabulous ways to use puff pastry that include an extra-special festive recipe that has been devised by Lisa.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Rick Stein retraces his first steps in Sydney, reconnecting with old friends and exploring the exciting and ever-evolving nature of its culinary landscape. S1 E1

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Japan's involvement in World War II is the focus of this watershed in documentary-making. Narrated by the great Laurence Olivier, incredible interviews also help set the scene.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: World War II in revealing detail, narrated by the great actor Laurence Olivier. Hear how the Americans fought their way across the Pacific towards Japan and the Philippines.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The critically acclaimed documentary series all about World War II. Hear about the Allied scientists' controversial efforts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Bobby Brown, Jeff Wayne, Happy Mondays (with Kirsty Maccoll), and New Kids On The Block. Jakki Brambles and Jenny Powell present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Kate Bush, Sydney Youngblood, Jeff Wayne, and Queen. Mark Goodier presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Duran Duran, De La Soul, 49ers, and Bros. Bruno Brookes and Anthea Turner present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Public Enemy, FPI Project Feat. Sharon Dee Clarke, Lonnie Gordon, Phil Collins, and Adamski. Simon Mayo and Jakki Brambles present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Cher, The Wedding Present, Sybil, Michael Bolton, and The Stranglers. Anthea Turner presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Gloria Estefan, Innocence, Erasure, Bros, and Beats International Feat. Lindy Layton. Bruno Brookes presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Heart, Inspiral Carpets, The Family Stand, Snap, and Queen Latifah & De La Soul. Nicky Campbell presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Mayo hosts, with performances by Black Box, Sam Brown, Erasure, Chad Jackson and Adamski.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Nicky Campbell hosts, with performances by Inspiral Carpets, Poison, Double Trouble and Massivo feat. Tracy.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Mark Goodier hosts, with performances by Craig McLachlan, Partners In Kryme, Dream Warriors and F.A.B. feat. MC Parker.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gary Davies hosts, with performances by Bombalurina, Craig McLachlan, Hothouse Flowers and Partners In Kryme.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gary Davies hosts, with performances by Londonbeat, Janet Jackson, Sonia, Bass-O-Matic and Faith No More.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Nicky Campbell hosts, with performances by Snap, The Charlatans and The Farm.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring The Righteous Brothers, Malandra Burrows, Enigma, The Carpenters, and Seal. Simon Mayo presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Bruno Brookes hosts the edition first aired on December 20. With performances by Snap, Cliff Richard, Vanilla Ice, the Carpenters, INXS, Enigma and MC Hammer.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Mark Goodier presents the edition first aired on February 21 1991, featuring performances by Chris Rea, Kenny Thomas, DJH featuring Stefy, Thunder, Xpansions and MC Hammer.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jackie Brambles presents the edition first aired on February 28 1991, featuring performances by N-Joi, Massive Attack and Jesus Jones.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Mayo and Lenny Henry present the edition first aired on March 14 1991, featuring performances by Chesney Hawkes, Ride, Queen, Massive Attack and Happy Mondays.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Bruno Brookes presents the edition first aired on March 28 1991, featuring performances by Dannii Minogue, Gary Clail On-U Sound System, Chesney Hawkes and James.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Mark Goodier presents the edition first aired on February 21 1991, featuring performances by Chris Rea, Kenny Thomas, DJH featuring Stefy, Thunder, Xpansions and MC Hammer.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve concludes his epic journey. He samples delicacies in Laos, meets high achieving children in Taiwan and explores Hawaii's environmental problems.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey on the island of Hispaniola and its two very different countries of the Dominican Republic - a tourist hotspot - and its poorer neighbour Haiti.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The second leg of Simon Reeve's journey around the Caribbean Sea takes him from the beautiful island of Barbados to St Vincent and the Grenadines, Venezuela and Colombia.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's last leg begins on the remote Caribbean coast of Nicaragua before he encounters extreme violence on the mainland of Honduras and finishes his adventure on Jamaica.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve concludes his epic journey. He samples delicacies in Laos, meets high achieving children in Taiwan and explores Hawaii's environmental problems.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey on the island of Hispaniola and its two very different countries of the Dominican Republic - a tourist hotspot - and its poorer neighbour Haiti.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The second leg of Simon Reeve's journey around the Caribbean Sea takes him from the beautiful island of Barbados to St Vincent and the Grenadines, Venezuela and Colombia.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's last leg begins on the remote Caribbean coast of Nicaragua before he encounters extreme violence on the mainland of Honduras and finishes his adventure on Jamaica.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the family fighting to put some money on the table in 1980s Liverpool. Adrian is arrested while riding his bicycle. The family decide to keep a secret from Pa Boswell.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A very special edition of the smash hit Liverpudlian sitcom featuring Paul and Linda McCartney playing themselves.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Adrian has his poems published and buys the family gifts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Oswald breaks off his engagement to Aveline.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Mrs Boswell goes for a trip in Derek's boat and catches Freddie and Lilo Lill misbehaving.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Friendly faces and some serious scrapes in the much-loved Liverpudlian sitcom. Adrian meets Ellia and they go to the woods where, to the family's amusement, she steals his clothes.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the family fighting to put some money on the table in 1980s Liverpool. Adrian is arrested while riding his bicycle. The family decide to keep a secret from Pa Boswell.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A very special edition of the smash hit Liverpudlian sitcom featuring Paul and Linda McCartney playing themselves.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Adrian has his poems published and buys the family gifts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Oswald breaks off his engagement to Aveline.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Reynolds finds himself caught between a chance for love and an opportunity to spend precious time with his father. S5 E10

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Though she refuses Patty's offer to come back to work, Ellen does agree to return to press Moore for more information that could help nail Frobisher. S1 E11

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: A unique family of employees at a super-sized megastore hilariously tackle the day-to-day grind of rabid bargain hunters, riot-causing sales, and nap-worthy training sessions.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Levi and Mackenzie face a difficult conversation. Abigail and Remi clash. Is Sonny tempted for a faster recovery.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: The travel guides explore the tropical island paradise of Mauritius, a resort holiday with a cultural twist off the east coast of Africa.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer's mother returns to Springfield, she asks Homer for his forgiveness. S19 E19

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny try to have a wedding ceremony that everyone can attend, but Leonard's parents are fighting and Sheldon's Mum takes a shine to Leonard's Dad! S9 E24

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard dream of a drama free wedding day. But when they wake up they'll have to deal with Leonard's father spending the night with Sheldon's mother! S10 E1

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When an emotion-driven decision puts Woodstone at risk, Sam and Jay step up to defend what they've built; Isaac struggles to adjust to new surroundings. S5 E19

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A night time dog walk turns into crash chaos as a woman flips her car after walking in the park with her pet. Police officers respond to what seems an entire street blocked off due to the incident.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is imprisoned by a beast in his castle. Despite her fears, she learns to see beyond the beast's hideous exterior. Starring Emma Watson and Dan Stevens. (2017)

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: While vacationing in Australia, Danny and Sandy indulge in a passionate love affair with each other. They part ways believing they will not see each other again, but fate has other plans. (1978)

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: In the last of the quarter-finals, determined Contenders battle it out for a place in the semis. An incredible performance on the Eliminator results in a record-breaking time.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: It’s the final night of the Blind auditions, as Kate and LeAnn go head-to-head to win the final artists for their teams.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran anxiously anticipates a big party on her first anniversary with the Sheffields. S2 E5

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: With FIFA World Cup fever hitting the globe, Niuean footballer Jaylen Rodwell takes us into his world, while musician Jarna creates a fresh beat inspired by her Glen Innes neighbourhood.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris can't help himself.
